title.en: Ye Tian left the second deity in the wasteland ...

content.en:
Ye Tian left the second deity in the wasteland and left alone.

It can be said that with his current combat strength, there are very few people in the Domination Realm who can compete with him, and unless Tianzun makes a move, he will hardly have any threat.

However, he still did not have the strength to fight against Tianzun.

The gap between the Domination Realm and the Tianzun Realm is too big, not to mention that he is only in the Universe God Realm, and it is almost unrealistic to want to challenge Tianzun beyond the two great realms.

After all, there are no weak people in the Tianzun realm, and the strong people who can impact the Tianzun realm are basically very geniuses, and even the children of the universe are basically children.

Therefore, it is impossible to challenge Tianzun beyond the two great realms.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to the Terran Holy City.

And not long after Ye Tian returned, the abyss of destruction of the universe changed again.

this day.

In the depths of ruin, the abyss of ruin, which had long since calmed down, surged again.

Rumble!!!!

Massive creatures of destruction burst out of the abyss of destruction, ready to attack the universe.

It was so sudden that it could even be said that there was no warning at all.

In the past, if the abyss turmoil was shattered, there were signs, and all races basically had time to react, and even prepare in advance.

But this time, there was no time to prepare.

In addition, there was a Destruction of Creatures Turmoil not long ago, and it has just been suppressed, and it stands to reason that it will take a long time for the Destruction of Creatures Turmoil to occur again.

But now, something has happened, and the races are not prepared, and some of the nearby races have suffered.

One race after another was impacted by the destruction creatures, and they were annihilated in an instant, and even a few supreme beings did not have time to escape, and were besieged and killed by several powerful supreme-level destruction creatures.

Destroying creatures doesn't matter who the enemy is, it's completely a posture of destroying everything, and countless stars and star fields have been destroyed.

Soon, the powerhouses of the Protoss, the Demon and other races reacted and came to support as fast as possible, trying to suppress the destruction of the creatures.

However, due to the lack of preparation before, too many destructive creatures rushed out, so this time the disaster was far more than the last one.

Yuangu Palace.

When the Lord of the Yuan Gu knew that the Destroying Creatures had rushed out of the Abyss of Destruction, his expression immediately changed drastically, and he summoned the other Supremes to suppress those Destroying Creatures.

Soon, most of the supremes of the Twelve Universe Era came, and they went to support as soon as possible.

They went to support so quickly, not with good intentions, but because they had to do so.

"Destroy the abyss, let's forget about this factor!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sighed.

"Yes, every cosmic epoch has an Abyss of Destruction, but because the Abyss of Destruction only erupts once over a long period of time, we all have no influence on the Abyss of Destruction and ignore its existence. Jin Guang Tianzun frowned and said, "Moreover, this cosmic epoch only broke out a life-destroying turmoil not long ago, so we ignored a little more. I didn't expect the second turmoil to break out so quickly!"

"It should be because of the Origin of the Universe!" said the Lord of the Ancient Ages: "Although the Origin of the Universe cannot control the Abyss of Destruction, the Origin of the Universe has also been suppressing the Abyss of Destruction. But this time, we used the Chaos Arcana to suppress the Origin of the Universe, which is estimated to lead to the deduction of the will of the Origin of the Universe, and finally use the Abyss of Destruction to counter us. This time, the Origin of the Universe will definitely give up suppressing the Abyss of Destruction, and those destructive creatures that will break the Abyss will rush out. Once the destroying creatures destroy too many star fields and living beings, the power of the origin of the universe will return, and even lead to the collapse of the universe in advance. The origin of the universe is immortal, and it will not be destroyed, but it will only start over again. "

"Ignored, I didn't expect the Universe Origin to use such means to stop our plan!"

The Stone Dragon Supreme said coldly.

"It should be said that it is we who forcibly resist the origin of the universe, which leads to the salvation of the origin of the universe. But now, things are a little troublesome, you must have all tried to enter the Abyss of Ruin, and the creatures of destruction that sleep in the deepest part of the Abyss of Ruin are not easy to deal with. In normal turmoil, the most terrible creatures of destruction would continue to sleep and not come out. But now, the origin of the universe is no longer suppressing the abyss of destruction, and those terrible destructive creatures have come out, and the supremes of this cosmic era will definitely not be able to stop it, and it must be up to us to resist it!"

"I'm really aggrieved, I still have to save the supreme of this universe era, if it weren't for the dual universe transcendence plan, I would definitely wait for the destruction of creatures to kill all the creatures of this universe era before making a move!"

"Don't talk nonsense, hurry over, don't wait for those terrible destructive creatures of the Abyss of Destruction to awaken and rush out, otherwise it will be really trouble!" the Lord of the Ancient Beings urged.

"Lord of the Yuangu, we will know!"

All the supreme ways.

......

Terran, Holy City.

Not long after Ye Tian came back, he was about to retreat, when a piece of news came out.

The creatures of destruction have reappeared!

Heavenly Pavilion.

"What, the creatures of destruction have reappeared?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

As soon as possible, he contacted Kunwu Supreme, after all, this is not a trivial matter, and it is not a disturbance to find Kunwu Supreme.

And an incarnation of the Kunwu Supreme saw Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, are you looking for me to ask about the destruction of creatures?"

Kunwu Supreme asked solemnly.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Kunwu Supreme said: "This time it was very troublesome, we didn't have any signs before, so the destruction creatures rushed out too much at once, and even many races were destroyed, and the Supreme died several times." Our human race has also sent nearly half of the Supreme Beings and many Celestial Beings to rush there. I've gone too, and now I've come to see you in an avatar. I estimate that it won't be long before you cosmic gods and supremes need to take action. Ye Tian, you are in the realm of the cosmic gods, so you must also be in the scope of recruitment. Remember, once you sense the aura of powerful destructive creatures, don't fall in love with the fight, and run away as soon as possible, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He also knew that the matter was very serious, and the last time the destruction of creatures was turbulent, it had caused many cosmic gods and masters of the human race to fall.

And the last time there was such a loss when there was preparation, and now there is no preparation at all, and it is not clear whether it can stop the destruction of creatures.

Once it can't be stopped, the Supreme will fall in large numbers, and the entire universe will enter the Great Destruction in advance.

But—

"Those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era will definitely make a move, otherwise the universe will enter a great ruin, and they will also have to die. Moreover, destroying creatures to kill living beings and destroy the star field is not conducive to their plans. Once the supremes of the twelve universe epochs make a move, they will definitely be able to suppress the destruction of creatures in the end, but I don't know how serious the loss will be, I hope the human race will lose less!"

Ye Tian sighed.
